title: calotropis herbacea
intro: Calotropis herbacea, also known as the half-shrivel or half-withered calotrope, is a species of flowering plant in the milkweed subfamily (Asclepiadoideae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been shown to exhibit potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Calotropis herbacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Calotropis herbacea can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat a range of health issues.
